'''Rrowv''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] who taught [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] how to control a [[mosgoth]] during Solo's short stay on [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]].
